title: Neck Trim Refactoring and Float Curve Helper
description: Refactored neck_trim.py from 248 lines of raw node code to 88 lines using node_helpers. Created create_float_curve helper in node_helpers.py with minimal [(x, y)] interface for ShaderNodeFloatCurve initialization.
definition-of-done: 1. neck_trim.py uses math_op, vec_math_op, separate_xyz, combine_xyz, compare_op helpers. 2. create_float_curve helper accepts list of (x,y) tuples and optional factor. 3. Existing blocker.py and neck_rails.py updated to use create_float_curve.
testing-plan: blender-cli validate --group Neck to verify geometry unchanged.
todos: DONE : Create create_float_curve helper in node_helpers.py
DONE : Refactor neck_trim.py to use helpers
DONE : Update neck_rails.py to use create_float_curve
DONE : Update blocker.py to use create_float_curve
changes-made: Added create_float_curve(group, value, points, factor=1.0) to node_helpers.py.
Refactored neck_trim.py from 248 to 88 lines (64% reduction).
Replaced manual ShaderNodeFloatCurve setup in neck_rails.py and blocker.py.
